# Aplus1

> Creative social app for freelancers and designers in Thailand — show work, get discovered, hire and collaborate.

## Site

- Home / feed: https://aplus1.app/
- Sign in: https://aplus1.app/auth
- Privacy: https://aplus1.app/legal/privacy
- Terms: https://aplus1.app/legal/terms
- Community guidelines: https://aplus1.app/legal/community
- Copyright report: https://aplus1.app/legal/copyright-report

## Product

Aplus1 (1px / Anthem) lets creatives publish a portfolio, browse projects and designers, and start hire or collab conversations. Soft-launch focuses on profiles and project discovery; some marketplace routes may be gated.

## Contact

- Product site: https://aplus1.app
- Prefer public pages and documented APIs; do not scrape authenticated or private user data.
